_doc: Per-category human+assisted review verdicts for the template photo pool. Built 2026-07-05 by personally reviewing every OSS image via /tmp/catrev contact-sheet montages (montage cells labeled #N = 0-based index into the ordered URL list in /tmp/catrev/_index.json, which is landscape-first then by url — the SAME order build_template_photo_pool fetches). mode='all' = every image is an approved photographic hero background. mode='block' = use all EXCEPT the listed indices (cutouts/illustrations/renders/glitch/off-topic/near-blank). mode='allow' = use ONLY the listed indices. Categories not listed here are treated as mode='all' by the builder (but the builder now prefers ind-*/ph-* clean sources).

ind-newmedia.note: vector icons / Security graphic / WP UI screenshot / glitch / SEO word-diagram

city.note: skylines/buildings/night cityscapes, all landscape, ideal heroes

ph-dessert.note: #27 macaron box with LA MADRE brand logo

ph-couple.note: real professional couple/wedding/lifestyle photography, all on-topic

ph-city.note: real city skyline/architecture photos, superb heroes

ph-business.note: #15 comedic banana-gun, #16 neon stylized, #38 kid-on-pink (not business)

ph-cherry.note: #10 non-cherry white flowers, #16 painting not photo

ph-milktea.note: drop off-topic herbal/green tea, coffee, kombucha, plain-milk churn, empty pot, outdoor party, CGI boba cup

ph-rabbit.note: drop ceramic/knitted/felt/painted-egg craft bunnies (not real rabbits)

ph-worker.note: drop glitch double-exposures, 'WE ARE HIRING' text graphic, 3D-printer/headphones/bare-skyscraper no-worker frames

food.note: keep the large majority of real appetizing food/drink photos; drop cartoon/vector illustrations, glitch-corrupted frames, near-blank frames, off-topic portraits, branded popcorn box, flat novelty product shots

design-scene.note: premium AI scene backgrounds (bakery/gym/clinic/nursery/spa/store/office/library/livingroom/kitchen/tech), modern & landscape

bg-gradient.note: keep smooth pastel/mesh gradients; drop bokeh/fence/smoke/water-drop/flower photos

bg-fresh.note: keep soft airy pastel florals; drop sharp macros, food, dark saturated rose, potted plant

bg-ink.note: keep ink-in-water abstracts; drop messy splatter, clashing band, murky grunge, lantern/fan/portrait objects

bg-simple.note: keep minimalist color-block scenes/still-lifes/soft plaster; drop brick/stone walls, desk objects, zen stones, people

bg-tech.note: keep clean digital abstracts (network/constellation lines, fiber dots, light streaks/mesh, tech gradients); drop social-logo/phone/face/matrix/NFT-AI-crypto text graphics

bg-geometric.note: keep clean single-hue/neutral geo; drop garish plaids/rainbow-triangles/op-art/glitch

bg-paper.note: keep flat/crumpled kraft+white paper textures; drop desk-scene object flatlays

bg-c4d.note: almost all product/object/interior renders; keep only minimal gray platform + neutral beige arches

bg-festive.note: almost all literal Christmas-object photos; keep only clean gold/silver confetti+particle abstracts

bg-guofeng.note: almost all object/scene photos; keep only ink-mist mountains + red pleated-fan textures

bg-line.note: keep clean subtle line patterns; drop garish stripes/plaids/op-art/zebra/plant/wood

wedding.note: keep real florals/rings/couples + p1 photography; drop illustrations/renders/glitch/off-topic/near-blank

business.note: keep building/office/city photos; drop the recurring junk illustration set

abstract.note: keep gradient/texture backgrounds; drop the illustration tail

nature.note: keep leaf/plant textures + lotus/autumn tree; drop illustrations/fish

fashion.note: keep denim textures + clothing product shots; drop illustrations

office.note: junk-drawer category: keep only the few real office photos (laptop/printer/keyboard/desk)

pet.note: keep real cat/dog photos; drop cartoon/vector/sketch/painted

travel.note: keep landscape photos + dragonfruit + mountain; drop illustrations

realestate.note: keep real interiors #0-15; drop cartoon houses/sketches

transport.note: keep vehicle/train/plane/ship photos (incl product-on-black cutouts); drop glitch #31 + toy tractor #32

ecommerce.note: keep studio/product-podium photos + airport; drop illustrations/renders/glitch/near-blank

celebration.note: almost all illustrations; keep only bokeh #8 + basketball #31 (weak) — celebration should draw from festival/ph-* instead

kids.note: almost all cartoons; only #23 photoreal — kids/baby subs should draw from ind-baby/baby/ph-* instead
